text: A photograph of a multi-story residential building painted light green and red, situated in an urban area. The building has balconies and decorative window grilles. A utility pole with wires stands in the foreground, partially obscuring the view. To the left is a dark vehicle and a small, gray utility shed. To the right, a portion of a red building is visible, featuring large white letters 'DD' on its facade. The scene is set under an overcast sky.
